$schema_note: Plugin registry for the Open Screen Deck companion. The app fetches this file (raw GitHub URL by default, configurable in Settings) and installs plugins by downloading each listed file into its plugin folder.

plugins.name: OBS Control
plugins.author: open-screen-deck
plugins.description: Scenes, streaming, and recording over obs-websocket. Connection managed in the plugin's settings; keys track live state.

changelog.1.0.0: First release: scene switching with live program tracking, stream and record toggles, connection settings on the plugin page.
changelog.1.1.0: Auto-connect is now a proper toggle in the plugin settings.

plugins.name: Weather
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Drawn weather face with condition glyphs. Press to flip between Now and Details (feels-like, wind, humidity).

changelog.2.1.0: New store icon so you can spot the plugin at a glance.
changelog.2.0.0: Drawn weather faces with condition glyphs. Press to flip between Now and Details.
changelog.2.2.0: Customize it: Celsius/Fahrenheit and starting view are now proper dropdowns.

plugins.name: Crypto Price
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Live price ticker with three press-cycled views: price, 24h trend, and a 7-day graph — drawn right on the key.

changelog.2.1.0: New store icon so you can spot the plugin at a glance.
changelog.2.0.0: Fully drawn ticker faces: press the key to cycle Price, 24h Trend, and a 7-day Graph.
changelog.2.2.0: Customize it: starting view (price / trend / graph) and graph period (24h / 7d / 30d).

plugins.name: World Clock
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: A real clock on the key — press to flip between an analog dial and a digital view with the date.

changelog.2.1.0: New store icon so you can spot the plugin at a glance.
changelog.2.0.0: A real clock face — press to flip between an analog dial and digital + date.
changelog.2.2.0: Customize it: choose an analog dial or digital + date as the resting face.

plugins.name: Web Request
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Webhook key with live feedback: sending → HTTP status, green for 2xx, red for errors.

changelog.2.1.0: New store icon so you can spot the plugin at a glance.
changelog.2.0.0: Live feedback on the key: SENDING… then the HTTP status, green for 2xx, red for errors.
changelog.2.2.0: Customize it: method dropdown and a per-key accent color.

plugins.name: Philips Hue
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: The key is the bulb — glows warm when the light is on. Press to toggle lights or rooms.

changelog.2.1.0: New store icon so you can spot the plugin at a glance.
changelog.2.0.0: The key is now the bulb — it glows warm when the light is on.
changelog.2.2.0: The room/group option is now a proper toggle.

plugins.name: Soundboard
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Speaker-branded keys with an animated equalizer while a sound plays. Press to play, press again to stop.

changelog.2.1.0: New store icon so you can spot the plugin at a glance.
changelog.2.0.0: Branded speaker face with an animated equalizer while a sound is playing.
changelog.2.2.0: Customize it: per-key accent color for the speaker face and equalizer.

plugins.name: Text Snippets
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Types canned text into the focused app. Keys wear a quote face with a preview of the snippet.

changelog.2.1.0: New store icon so you can spot the plugin at a glance.
changelog.2.0.0: Keys wear a quote face with a preview of their snippet.

plugins.name: Zoom Control
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Branded mic, camera, and raise-hand keys that control Zoom globally.

changelog.2.1.0: New store icon so you can spot the plugin at a glance.
changelog.2.0.0: Branded mic, camera, and raise-hand faces.

plugins.name: Screenshot
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: A camera key that flashes when it fires. Screen, area, or window — to clipboard or a folder.

changelog.2.1.0: New store icon so you can spot the plugin at a glance.
changelog.2.0.0: Camera face with a shutter flash when the screenshot fires.
changelog.2.2.0: Customize it: capture mode is now a dropdown (area / window / screen).

plugins.name: System Actions
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Lock screen, sleep displays, empty trash, toggle dark mode — each with its own drawn face.

changelog.2.1.0: New store icon so you can spot the plugin at a glance.
changelog.2.0.0: Each action gets its own drawn face: lock, sleep, trash, dark mode.

plugins.name: Home Assistant
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: Fires Home Assistant webhooks. Wears the HA house glyph and flashes with the result.

changelog.2.1.0: New store icon so you can spot the plugin at a glance.
changelog.2.0.0: Wears the HA house glyph and flashes green/red with the webhook result.

plugins.name: Pomodoro
plugins.author: Open Screen Deck
plugins.description: A progress ring that empties as focus time runs down, flips red for the break, and celebrates when done.

changelog.2.1.0: New store icon so you can spot the plugin at a glance.
changelog.2.0.0: Progress ring on the key: teal focus arc, red break arc, celebration when done.
changelog.2.2.0: Customize it: pick your own focus and break ring colors.
